Internal Deal Memo: Project Eclipse

Date: October 5, 2023

Prepared by: Dr. Jonathan Lim

Subject: Proposed Acquisition of Stellar Dynamics Pte. Ltd.

This memo outlines the proposed acquisition under Project Eclipse. The target company, Stellar Dynamics Pte. Ltd. (UEN: 201234567A), has been valued at SGD 75 million. The Share Purchase Agreement (the "SPA") has been drafted and is currently under review by legal counsel. Standalone review of this SPA is essential to ensure compliance with regulatory requirements.

The primary contact for this transaction is Mr. Tan Wei Ming, reachable at +65 6123 4567 or via email at wei.ming.tan@corporation.sg. Additionally, Ms. Siti Aishah binti Abdullah will oversee the integration phase post-acquisition. Her NRIC is S8765432Z, and further details can be found at https://example.sg/user/S8765432Z.

It is important to note that the project status remains preliminary, and the current project plan does not accommodate unforeseen regulatory delays. Continued diligence is necessary to adhere to the established timeline.

Please direct any inquiries to Dr. Lim or Mr. Tan for prompt assistance.
